## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services for Ceros' marketing strategy and organic traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content creation using AI workflows and expert oversight to drive organic traffic and AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Ceros aims to build a stronger inbound engine, reduce reliance on cold outreach, and generate higher-quality conversions](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves a strategy sprint followed by 12-month growth execution, with potential for custom workflows integrating Ceros' interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Next steps: Schedule technical deep-dive, share SOW and case studies, involve Mary (Ceros' content creator) in discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach and Differentiation

  - [Focuses on getting clients into AI answers, not just rankings and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [End-to-end partner from strategy to publishing, acting as an extension of the team](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with expert oversight (e.g., former leaders from Fanatics, TripAdvisor, G2, TechCrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Starts with editorial content (blogs, guides) then expands to custom projects (e.g., programmatic SEO, microsites)](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

### AI Workflow and Content Creation Process

  - [Uses sophisticated AI workflows beyond simple ChatGPT prompts](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Incorporates deep research, fact-checking, and confidence intervals](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Analyzes SERP ranking factors and competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Continuously evolves workflows and adapts to new AI models](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)

### Ceros' Goals and Needs

  - [Build stronger inbound marketing engine](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Reduce reliance on cold outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Generate higher-quality conversions](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Integrate interactive content capabilities with GrowthX's scale](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Content Strategy and Types

  - [Primary focus on editorial content (blogs, guides)](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Potential for custom projects like programmatic SEO, calculators, or integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Opportunity for content refreshes to improve existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

### ROI and Timeline Expectations

  - [Ceros team interested in understanding the arc of outcomes over time](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide case studies and examples of growth trajectories](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Importance of setting realistic expectations for traffic build-up (months, not weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a technical deep-dive meeting with Sig and team](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [GrowthX to share Statement of Work (SOW) detailing deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide case studies and growth trajectory examples](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Involve Mary (Ceros' content creator) in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Ceros team to internally discuss and assess the right approach](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Consider moving forward with the strategy sprint phase](https://fathom.video/share/zLVMeq3VE3StHTsGohiuFg8ARxJY_3ZG?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
